1.content: You are watching your favorite horror movie late at night it is _______ and it got to the best part when your tv suddenly turned off you then get sucked into the horror movie and when you wake up you realize you have become?
1.title: You are the monster

15.content:
Instead of becoming The Thing The Blob or the possession monster from Assimilation you have turned into a different movie monster.

What movie monster have you turned into?
15.title: Reader’s choice

154.content: Maybe your orga from Godzilla 2000 here to consume all the other kaijus
154.title: Your choice.

155.content: Maybe you become a different type of monster like
155.title: Reader's choice.

1552.content:
As you're looming over all of Tokyo city as you've become King Ghidorah Godzilla's greatest and most dangerous enemy he's ever fought against, as you smile and start stomping your way through the city casually smashing every building and skyscraper that stands in your way as you roar and stomp down the city's streets as the citizens flee in utter terror.

The Japanese self defense force starts firing at you as you unleash your lighting attack upon them as their air defense tries to stop you as well but they too are hit by your lightning attack as well.

At that moment another monster appears but who is it that's standing across from you?
1552.title: King Ghidorah

15524.content:
Maybe it’s orga here to swallow you whole like he tried to do to Godzilla that one time

https://www.google.com/url?sa=i&url=http...
15524.title: Reader's choice.

choices: The army and air force try to stop you and Orga.
155241.content:
As it turns out it was none than Orga himself as he stood across from you as he roared at you and charged at you as you managed to get out of the way in time as you unleashed a lightning bolt attack upon him.

Now that Orga's back is turned you then hit him with a few well placed blows as Orga's sent flying right through downtown Tokyo.

Now what will happen next?
155241.title: Yes let’s go with that

choices: The Meg from the movie the Meg
